name: Krispy Kreme Doughnuts, Inc.
description: Krispy Kreme, Inc. is an iconic American doughnut company and coffeehouse chain founded in 1937 in Winston-Salem, North Carolina. Renowned for its signature hot Original Glazed doughnuts, the company has expanded from a small local shop into a beloved global brand. Operating through U.S. and international segments, Krispy Kreme produces and distributes its products across numerous countries worldwide. The company remains dedicated to its heritage of quality and innovation, continuously finding new ways to deliver its fresh, sweet treats to customers through retail shops, grocery stores, and digital channels.
